biographyParagraphs: Hi, I'm Vignesh. I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with a deep interest in creating beautiful, interactive, and high-performance digital experiences. I believe that web applications shouldn't just be functional—they should be an experience to interact with.

My expertise covers modern web development from the user interface and animations (using React, Next.js, and GSAP) down to database structures and server deployment (using Node.js, MongoDB, and Cloud Platforms). I bridge the gap between complex engineering and pixel-perfect design.
I spend my time constantly learning new web standards, optimizing performance metrics, and adding refined micro-animations that give user interfaces a premium, responsive feel.

planets.name: AI
planets.description: LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, vector search, and agentic workflows.
